---
title: "Diego Chuquimia"
---

## Data Analytics Portfolio

Welcome to my portfolio. I am an Economics student with experience in R, SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel.

## About Me

I am interested in financial analysis, business analytics, and data visualization.

## Featured Projects

- R: Apartment Price Analysis
- SQL: Airbnb Profitability Analysis
- Python: Student Housing Recommender
- Power BI: Financial Dashboard
- Excel: Budget vs Actual Report
